name: Jellyfin Signup
description: Invite-based public signup, email verification, and password reset for Jellyfin.
overview: Adds a Jellyfin-branded public signup page with invite controls and an admin dashboard configuration page.

versions.changelog: Adds public settings so the signup page hides invite codes when not required, tracks Jellyfin user email mappings for reset-code delivery, adds email/user and appearance settings tabs, preserves verification login redirect behavior, and fixes policy application for Jellyfin 10.11 user creation.
